name: com.mycore.datatoolkit
description: A reusable static-data loader for Unity: fetch versioned config tables from a DataTool-style remote API, with write-key change-detection, disk caching, fallback, and parallel/heavy load modes. Plain-class orchestrator (no singleton), wired through 3 small adapters. Zero game-specific dependencies.

samples.description: App-side wiring: config/network(flatten)/write-key-store adapters + bootstrap (guarded by DATATOOLKIT_SAMPLES).
